hero.headline: Bina Operation ke 14 Din mein Bawaseer se Puri Rahat Paiye.

pain.headline: "Doctor bolta hai surgery hi ek rasta hai..."
pain.fearDesc: Chaku se bachiye. Operation aksar symptom ko theek karta hai, jad ko nahi. Dobara ho sakta hai.
pain.painTitle: Roz ka dard nahi ruk raha?
pain.painDesc: Baithna mushkil ho gaya. Kaam suffer kar raha hai. Chup rehkar takleef mat jhelo.
pain.safeDesc: Tissues ko heal karo, sujan kam karo, aur pet ki regularity naturally wapas lao.

howItWorks.title: 14-Din ka Relief Protocol
howItWorks.step1Desc: Hamare experts se apne symptoms confirm karo aur sahi pack chuno.

faq.title: Aksar Pooche Jane Waale Sawaal
faq.q1: Kya ye safe hai? Koi side effect?
faq.a1: 100% Ayurvedic aur GMP Certified. Koi jaani side effect nahi. Long term use ke liye safe.
faq.a2: Zyaadatar log 3-5 din mein rahat report karte hain. Puri recovery 14-30 din mein.
faq.a3: Haan! Pure India mein COD available hai. Koi advance payment nahi chahiye.
faq.a4: 30 din mein humse contact karo. Hum sahi protocol par guide karenge.
